name: Fusion July-Dabi and Takami
description: Villains have been running around Japan terrorizing UA students with a fusion quirk. Now it was time for the heroes to step in. During the fight though, the winged hero Hawks gets thrown into Dabi whom was watching the fight from a far away alley. Both fuse and as you the only villain to have seen it you now must 'take care of' the fusion on the hero and villain.
creator: Cloudyhugboi
